headline: Schwab Says Earnings Jump 30%, Plans to Launch Crypto Trading
summary: Charles Schwab’s  quarterly profit climbed 30%, lifted by a flurry of client trading activity and volatile financial markets.  The brokerage giant also said Thursday it would soon allow customers to trade bitcoin and ether on its platform, marking the latest traditional financial powerhouse to cater to individual investors’ penchant for digital assets.  Excluding certain one-time items such as acquisition costs, Schwab earned $1.43 a share in the most-recent period.

Excluding certain one-time items such as acquisition costs, Schwab earned $1.43 a share in the most-recent period.

headline: How FactSet’s CFO Transition to Joshua Warren Could Shape FDS Investors’ View on AI and M&A
summary: On April 8, 2026, FactSet Research Systems announced that CFO Helen Shan would step down and be succeeded by Joshua Warren, a former Envestnet finance chief with extensive experience in asset management, financial technology and capital markets, effective April 13, 2026. This CFO transition brings in a leader known for overhauling finance and operating functions at a major fintech platform, which could influence FactSet’s approach to cost management, capital allocation and product investment...
